poiName: 四季民福烤鸭店(故宫店)

zh_cn.name: 四季民福烤鸭店（故宫店）
zh_cn.description: 故宫旁景观烤鸭店，可边品正宗京味烤鸭边赏紫禁城全景，英文服务完善+F2
zh_cn.pricing: 人均160元，烤鸭套餐298元/套起
zh_cn.directions: 地铁1号线天安门东站C口出，步行800米；公交1、2、52路天安门东站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: Siji Minfu Peking Duck (Forbidden City Branch)
en.description: A scenic Peking duck restaurant by the Forbidden City, where you can savor authentic flavors while enjoying panoramic palace views; full English service available
en.address: No. 11 Nanchizi Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 160 per person; Peking duck set menus from RMB 298
en.directions: Subway Line 1 to Tian'anmen East Station (Exit C), 800 m walk; Bus 1, 2, or 52 to Tian'anmen East, 5-minute walk

poiName: 方砖厂69号炸酱面(南锣鼓巷店)

zh_cn.name: 方砖厂69号炸酱面（南锣鼓巷店）
zh_cn.description: 胡同里的老北京炸酱面代表，可观摩制作过程，性价比高，涉外友好
zh_cn.pricing: 人均45元，招牌炸酱面35元/碗，加菜10-15元/份
zh_cn.directions: 地铁6、8号线南锣鼓巷站E口出，步行300米；公交107、124路宝钞胡同站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Fangzhuanchang No.69 Zhajiang Noodles (Nanluoguxiang Branch)
en.description: A hutong favorite for classic Beijing zhajiang noodles, with live preparation to watch; great value and foreigner-friendly
en.address: No. 18 Nanluoguxiang, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 45 per person; signature zhajiang noodles RMB 35 per bowl; add-ons RMB 10-15
en.directions: Subway Lines 6/8 to Nanluoguxiang (Exit E), 300 m walk; Bus 107 or 124 to Baochao Hutong, 2-minute walk

poiName: 护国寺小吃(护国寺总店)

zh_cn.name: 护国寺小吃（总店）
zh_cn.description: 京味小吃集合地，驴打滚、艾窝窝等传统美食一站式体验，平价亲民
zh_cn.pricing: 人均35元，单品5-20元/份，小吃拼盘88元/份（含6种经典小吃）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁4号线平安里站C口出，步行500米；公交701、88路护国寺站下车，步行1分钟

en.name: Huguosi Snack Bar (Main Branch)
en.description: A one-stop hub for traditional Beijing snacks like lüdagun and aiwowo; affordable and perfect for sampling local flavors
en.address: No. 93 Huguosi Street, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 35 per person; individual snacks RMB 5-20; snack sampler platter RMB 88 (includes 6 classic items)
en.directions: Subway Line 4 to Ping'anli (Exit C), 500 m walk; Bus 701 or 88 to Huguosi, 1-minute walk

poiName: 清真•鸦儿李记•小馆(后海店)

zh_cn.name: 鸦儿李记（后海店）
zh_cn.description: 后海旁清真铜锅涮肉，边赏湖景边吃鲜切羊肉，涉外服务成熟
zh_cn.pricing: 人均120元，鲜切羊肉68元/份，铜锅锅底30元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁8号线什刹海站A口出，步行600米；公交5、635路德内甘水桥站下车，步行8分钟

en.name: Yaar Li Ji (Houhai Branch)
en.description: Halal copper-pot hotpot by Houhai Lake, offering hand-sliced lamb with lakeside views; well-equipped for international guests
en.address: No. 19 Houhai Beiyan, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 120 per person; freshly sliced lamb RMB 68; traditional copper hotpot base RMB 30
en.directions: Subway Line 8 to Shichahai (Exit A), 600 m walk; Bus 5 or 635 to Denei Ganshuiqiao, 8-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 京兆尹（米其林素食）
zh_cn.description: 四合院中的米其林三星素食，高端精致，融合传统与创新，英文服务一流
zh_cn.pricing: 人均680元，午市套餐580元/人，晚市套餐880元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线雍和宫站D口出，步行400米；公交13、684路五道营胡同站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: King’s Joy (Michelin-Starred Vegetarian)
en.description: A Michelin three-star vegetarian dining experience set in a courtyard house, blending tradition with innovation; top-tier English service
en.address: No. 2 Wudaoying Hutong, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 680 per person; lunch set RMB 580 per person; dinner set RMB 880 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Yonghegong (Exit D), 400 m walk; Bus 13 or 684 to Wudaoying Hutong, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 全聚德（前门店）
zh_cn.description: 百年烤鸭老字号，前门店历史最久，传统挂炉烤鸭技艺，涉外接待经验丰富
zh_cn.pricing: 人均180元，经典烤鸭328元/只，鸭架汤68元/份
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线前门站C口出，步行200米；公交5、17、20路前门站下车，步行1分钟

en.name: Quanjude Roast Duck (Qianmen Branch)
en.description: A century-old Peking duck institution at Qianmen, famed for its traditional hanging-oven technique; highly experienced with international visitors
en.address: No. 30 Qianmen Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 180 per person; classic roast duck RMB 328 each; duck carcass soup RMB 68
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Qianmen (Exit C), 200 m walk; Bus 5, 17, or 20 to Qianmen, 1-minute walk

zh_cn.name: Metal Hands咖啡（五道营店）
zh_cn.description: 胡同里的精品咖啡，文艺氛围浓厚，涉外游客聚集地，英文服务流畅
zh_cn.pricing: 人均45元，招牌拿铁38元，手冲咖啡48-68元/杯
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线雍和宫站D口出，步行300米；公交13、684路五道营胡同站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Metal Hands Coffee (Wudaoying Branch)
en.description: A boutique hutong café with an artsy vibe, popular among international visitors; smooth English service
en.address: No. 61 Wudaoying Hutong, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 45 per person; signature latte RMB 38; pour-over coffee RMB 48-68 per cup
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Yonghegong (Exit D), 300 m walk; Bus 13 or 684 to Wudaoying Hutong, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 糖房咖啡（什刹海店）
zh_cn.description: 什刹海全景露台咖啡，可俯瞰后海、前海风光，网红打卡地，涉外友好
zh_cn.address: 西城区什刹海前海北沿50号
zh_cn.pricing: 人均60元，招牌观景咖啡58元，甜品35-50元/份
zh_cn.directions: 地铁8号线什刹海站A口出，步行500米；公交5、635路德内甘水桥站下车，步行10分钟

en.name: Tangfang Café (Shichahai Branch)
en.description: A rooftop café overlooking Shichahai, with sweeping views of Houhai and Qianhai; a trendy photo spot, foreigner-friendly
en.address: No. 50 Qianhai Beiyan, Shichahai, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 60 per person; signature scenic-view coffee RMB 58; desserts RMB 35-50
en.directions: Subway Line 8 to Shichahai (Exit A), 500 m walk; Bus 5 or 635 to Denei Ganshuiqiao, 10-minute walk

zh_cn.name: BERRY BEANS咖啡（南锣鼓巷店）
zh_cn.description: 复古风精品咖啡，南锣鼓巷安静角落，适合独处打卡，英文标识齐全
zh_cn.pricing: 人均42元，招牌美式32元，复古特调48元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁6、8号线南锣鼓巷站E口出，步行400米；公交107、124路宝钞胡同站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: BERRY BEANS Coffee (Nanluoguxiang Branch)
en.description: A vintage-style café tucked in a quiet corner of Nanluoguxiang, ideal for solo visits; clear English signage
en.address: No. 141 Nanluoguxiang, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 42 per person; signature Americano RMB 32; house vintage-style specials RMB 48
en.directions: Subway Lines 6/8 to Nanluoguxiang (Exit E), 400 m walk; Bus 107 or 124 to Baochao Hutong, 5-minute walk

poiName: 茶汤李京味餐厅(鼓楼店)

zh_cn.name: 茶汤李（鼓楼店）
zh_cn.description: 老北京传统甜饮店，茶汤、面茶、杏仁豆腐等经典甜品，涉外服务贴心
zh_cn.pricing: 人均25元，茶汤18元/碗，杏仁豆腐15元/份，面茶12元/碗
zh_cn.directions: 地铁8号线什刹海站B口出，步行700米；公交5、635路鼓楼东站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Chatang Li (Gulou Branch)
en.description: A traditional dessert shop serving classics like tea soup and almond tofu; attentive service for international guests
en.address: No. 206 Gulou East Street, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 25 per person; tea soup RMB 18 per bowl; almond tofu RMB 15; miancha RMB 12 per bowl
en.directions: Subway Line 8 to Shichahai (Exit B), 700 m walk; Bus 5 or 635 to Gulou East, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 南门涮肉（后海店）
zh_cn.description: 老北京铜锅涮肉人气品牌，后海分店环境清幽，鲜切羊肉与麻酱蘸料经典
zh_cn.pricing: 人均130元，鲜切元宝肉78元/份，铜锅锅底28元，麻酱蘸料10元/份
zh_cn.directions: 地铁8号线什刹海站A口出，步行700米；公交5、635路德内甘水桥站下车，步行10分钟

en.name: Nanmen Hotpot (Houhai Branch)
en.description: A popular Beijing-style hotpot chain near Houhai, known for its tranquil setting, fresh-cut lamb, and signature sesame dipping sauce
en.address: No. 23 Houhai Beiyan, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 130 per person; premium hand-sliced lamb RMB 78; copper hotpot base RMB 28; sesame dipping sauce RMB 10
en.directions: Subway Line 8 to Shichahai (Exit A), 700 m walk; Bus 5 or 635 to Denei Ganshuiqiao, 10-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 胡大饭馆（簋街店）
zh_cn.description: 簋街麻辣小龙虾代表，夜宵热门地，口味多样，涉外服务完善
zh_cn.address: 东城区东直门内大街233号
zh_cn.pricing: 人均180元，麻辣小龙虾158元/斤，蒜蓉小龙虾168元/斤，配菜10-20元/份
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线东直门站D口出，步行500米；公交107、123路东直门内站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Hu Da Restaurant (Guijie Branch)
en.description: A go-to spot on Guijie for spicy crayfish, perfect for late-night dining with diverse flavors; international-friendly service
en.address: No. 233 Dongzhimen Inner Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Around RMB 180 per person; spicy crayfish RMB 158 per jin; garlic crayfish RMB 168 per jin; side dishes RMB 10-20
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Dongzhimen (Exit D), 500 m walk; Bus 107 or 123 to Dongzhimen Inner, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 故宫博物院
zh_cn.description: 世界文化遗产，明清皇宫建筑群，中国古代宫殿艺术巅峰，英文导览完善
zh_cn.pricing: 门票60元/人（旺季），40元/人（淡季）；珍宝馆、钟表馆各10元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁1号线天安门东站C口出，步行1.2公里；公交1、2、52路天安门东站下车，步行15分钟

en.name: The Palace Museum (Forbidden City)
en.description: A UNESCO World Heritage site and the pinnacle of imperial Chinese architecture; comprehensive English-guided tours available
en.address: No. 4 Jingshan Front Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Admission RMB 60 in peak season / RMB 40 in low season; Treasure Gallery and Clock Gallery RMB 10 each
en.directions: Subway Line 1 to Tian'anmen East (Exit C), 1.2 km walk; Bus 1, 2, or 52 to Tian'anmen East, 15-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 八达岭长城
zh_cn.description: 明长城最具代表性段落，“不到长城非好汉”打卡地，英文标识与服务完善
zh_cn.address: 延庆区军都山关沟古道北口
zh_cn.pricing: 门票40元/人（淡季），45元/人（旺季）；缆车往返140元/人，单程100元/人；滑车往返100元/人
zh_cn.directions: 高铁：北京北站乘G8881次，25分钟直达；公交：德胜门乘877路，2小时直达；自驾：京藏高速八达岭出口

en.name: Badaling Great Wall
en.description: The most iconic section of the Great Wall, a must-visit landmark; well-developed English signage and services
en.address: North Entrance of Guangu Ancient Path, Jundu Mountains, Yanqing District
en.pricing: Admission RMB 40 in low season / RMB 45 in peak season; cable car RMB 140 round-trip or RMB 100 one-way; toboggan RMB 100 round-trip
en.directions: High-speed train: from Beijing North Station (approx. 25 min); Bus 877 from Deshengmen (approx. 2 hrs); Driving: Jingzang Expressway, Badaling exit

zh_cn.name: 颐和园
zh_cn.description: 中国最大皇家园林，“皇家园林博物馆”，湖光山色与古典建筑完美融合
zh_cn.pricing: 门票30元/人（旺季），20元/人（淡季）；联票60元/人（含园中园）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁4号线北宫门站D口出，步行500米；公交303、330路颐和园北宫门站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Summer Palace
en.description: China's largest imperial garden, often called a "royal garden museum," blending lakes, hills, and classical architecture
en.address: No. 19 Xinjianggongmen Road, Haidian District
en.pricing: Admission RMB 30 in peak season / RMB 20 in low season; combo ticket RMB 60 including additional garden areas
en.directions: Subway Line 4 to Beigongmen (Exit D), 500 m walk; Bus 303 or 330 to Summer Palace North Gate, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 天坛公园
zh_cn.description: 明清皇家祭天建筑群，世界文化遗产，回音壁、祈年殿等景观极具特色
zh_cn.pricing: 门票15元/人（淡季联票），28元/人（旺季联票）；单大门票10/15元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁5号线天坛东门站A口出，步行300米；公交36、106、110路天坛东门站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Temple of Heaven Park
en.description: A UNESCO-listed imperial altar complex, famous for the Echo Wall and Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests
en.address: Jia No. 1 Tiantan Road, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Through-ticket RMB 15 in low season / RMB 28 in peak season; main gate only RMB 10/15
en.directions: Subway Line 5 to Tiantan East Gate (Exit A), 300 m walk; Bus 36, 106, or 110 to Tiantan East Gate, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 雍和宫
zh_cn.description: 北京最大藏传佛教寺院，红墙金顶，香火旺盛，文化底蕴深厚
zh_cn.pricing: 门票25元/人，香免费（每人限领一束）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线雍和宫站F口出，步行200米；公交13、684路雍和宫站下车，步行1分钟

en.name: Lama Temple (Yonghe Temple)
en.description: Beijing's largest Tibetan Buddhist temple, known for its red walls, golden roofs, and rich spiritual heritage
en.address: No. 12 Yonghegong Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Admission RMB 25; incense is free, one bundle per visitor
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Yonghegong (Exit F), 200 m walk; Bus 13 or 684 to Yonghegong, 1-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 中国国家博物馆
zh_cn.description: 中华五千年文明缩影，馆藏文物丰富，免费开放，英文讲解完善
zh_cn.opening_hours: 09:00-17:00（16:00停止入馆），周一闭馆（法定节假日除外）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费（需预约），英文讲解器40元/台
zh_cn.directions: 地铁1号线天安门东站B口出，步行300米；公交1、2、52路天安门东站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: National Museum of China
en.description: A comprehensive showcase of 5,000 years of Chinese civilization; free entry with well-developed English explanations
en.address: No. 16 East Chang'an Avenue, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Free admission with advance reservation; English audio guide RMB 40
en.directions: Subway Line 1 to Tian'anmen East (Exit B), 300 m walk; Bus 1, 2, or 52 to Tian'anmen East, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 恭王府
zh_cn.description: 清代规模最大王府，“一座恭王府，半部清代史”，园林与建筑兼具
zh_cn.pricing: 门票40元/人（旺季），30元/人（淡季）；英文讲解100元/5人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁8号线什刹海站C口出，步行600米；公交3、13、42路北海北门站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: Prince Gong’s Mansion
en.description: The largest princely mansion of the Qing Dynasty, offering both grand architecture and refined gardens
en.address: No. 17 Qianhai West Street, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Admission RMB 40 in peak season / RMB 30 in low season; English guided tour RMB 100 for up to 5 people
en.directions: Subway Line 8 to Shichahai (Exit C), 600 m walk; Bus 3, 13, or 42 to Beihai North Gate, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 798艺术区
zh_cn.description: 废弃工厂改造的当代艺术区，画廊、文创店、雕塑遍布，国际氛围浓厚
zh_cn.opening_hours: 10:00-19:00（大部分），部分展览延长至21:00；周一部分画廊闭店
zh_cn.pricing: 艺术区免费，部分特展50-150元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁14号线望京南站A口出，打车10分钟；公交401、402、405路大山子路口南站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: 798 Art District
en.description: A former industrial zone turned contemporary art district, filled with galleries, installations, and a global creative vibe
en.address: No. 4 Jiuxianqiao Road, Chaoyang District
en.opening_hours: 10:00–19:00 (most venues); some exhibitions until 21:00; some galleries closed Mondays
en.pricing: Entry to the art district is free; selected special exhibitions cost RMB 50-150
en.directions: Subway Line 14 to Wangjing South (Exit A), 10-minute taxi ride; Bus 401/402/405 to Dashanzi South, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 史家胡同博物馆
zh_cn.description: 藏于胡同中的微型博物馆，展示老北京胡同生活，“老北京声音博物馆”特色鲜明
zh_cn.pricing: 免费（需现场登记）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁5号线东单站D口出，步行800米；公交106、116、684路史家胡同站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Shijia Hutong Museum
en.description: A hidden hutong museum showcasing old Beijing life, with a unique "Sounds of Old Beijing" experience
en.address: No. 24 Shijia Hutong, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Free admission; on-site registration required
en.directions: Subway Line 5 to Dongdan (Exit D), 800 m walk; Bus 106/116/684 to Shijia Hutong, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 老舍茶馆
zh_cn.description: 体验老北京传统艺术的绝佳场所，京剧、相声、变脸等表演，可边品茶边观赏
zh_cn.address: 西城区前门西大街正阳市场三号楼
zh_cn.pricing: 茶位费80-280元/人（含茶水、小吃），VIP座位380元/人；表演无额外收费
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线前门站B口出，步行500米；公交5、17、20路前门站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Laoshe Teahouse
en.description: A perfect venue to experience traditional arts like Peking Opera and crosstalk, enjoyed alongside tea
en.address: Building 3, Zhengyang Market, Qianmen West Street, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Tea seating starts at RMB 80-280 per person, including tea and snacks; VIP seating RMB 380; performances included
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Qianmen (Exit B), 500 m walk; Bus 5, 17, or 20 to Qianmen, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 法海寺
zh_cn.description: 明代壁画艺术瑰宝，大雄宝殿壁画精美绝伦，被誉为“明代壁画之最”
zh_cn.address: 石景山区翠微山南麓模式口大街48号
zh_cn.opening_hours: 09:00-16:30（周二至周日），周一闭馆；壁画观赏分时段预约
zh_cn.pricing: 门票40元/人，壁画特展100元/人（含专业讲解）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁6号线金安桥站C口出，打车10分钟；公交336、389、597路模式口西里站下车，步行10分钟

en.name: Fahai Temple
en.description: A masterpiece of Ming Dynasty mural art, renowned for its exquisite temple frescoes
en.address: No. 48 Moshikou Street, South Foot of Cuiwei Mountain, Shijingshan District
en.opening_hours: 09:00–16:30 (Tue–Sun); closed Mondays; mural viewing by timed reservation
en.pricing: Admission RMB 40; mural special exhibition RMB 100, including professional commentary
en.directions: Subway Line 6 to Jin'anqiao (Exit C), 10-minute taxi; Bus 336/389/597 to Moshikou West, 10-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 北京天文馆
zh_cn.description: 宇宙科普胜地，球幕电影、天文展品丰富，适合亲子与科普爱好者，英文服务完善
zh_cn.address: 西城区西直门外大街138号
zh_cn.opening_hours: 09:30-16:30（周二至周日），周一闭馆（法定节假日除外）
zh_cn.pricing: 门票10元/人，球幕电影45元/人，宇宙剧场60元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁4号线动物园站D口出，步行300米；公交105、111、332路动物园站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Beijing Planetarium
en.description: A top destination for space and science enthusiasts, featuring dome films and interactive exhibits; family-friendly with English support
en.address: No. 138 Xizhimen Outer Street, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Admission RMB 10; dome film RMB 45; Space Theater RMB 60
en.directions: Subway Line 4 to Beijing Zoo (Exit D), 300 m walk; Bus 105/111/332 to Zoo stop, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 中国美术馆
zh_cn.description: 国家级艺术殿堂，集中展示近现代中国画、油画、雕塑等精品，免费开放且英文标识完善
zh_cn.opening_hours: 09:00-17:00（16:00停止入馆），周一闭馆（法定节假日除外）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费（需实名预约），特展单独购票（50-100元/人）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁8号线中国美术馆站C口出，步行200米；公交101、103、109路沙滩路口西站下车，步行1分钟

en.name: National Art Museum of China
en.description: A national-level art museum showcasing modern and contemporary Chinese works; free entry with clear English signage
en.address: No. 1 Wusi Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Free admission with real-name reservation; special exhibitions are ticketed separately at RMB 50-100
en.directions: Subway Line 8 to National Art Museum (Exit C), 200 m walk; Bus 101/103/109 to Shatan West, 1-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 古北水镇（含司马台长城）
zh_cn.description: 北方水乡与长城结合的度假胜地，夜游司马台长城、赏水乡灯笼，国际服务成熟
zh_cn.address: 密云区古北口镇司马台村
zh_cn.pricing: 门票140元/人，长城夜游联票190元/人，住宿800-2000元/晚
zh_cn.directions: 自驾：京承高速司马台出口，2小时；公交：东直门980路转专线；旅游专线：东直门直达，1.5小时

en.name: Gubei Water Town (including Simatai Great Wall)
en.description: A unique resort combining a northern water town with the Great Wall; night tours and lantern-lit scenery with strong international services
en.address: Simatai Village, Gubeikou Town, Miyun District
en.pricing: Admission RMB 140; night tour combo ticket RMB 190; accommodation ranges from RMB 800-2000 per night
en.directions: Driving: Jingcheng Expressway, Simatai exit (~2 hrs); Bus 980 from Dongzhimen + shuttle; Direct tourist line from Dongzhimen (~1.5 hrs)

zh_cn.name: 北京环球度假区
zh_cn.description: 国际顶级主题乐园，哈利波特、变形金刚等IP全覆盖，英文服务与标识标准化
zh_cn.address: 通州区京哈高速与东六环路交汇处
zh_cn.pricing: 标准票528-748元/人，快速通玩卡400-1200元/人，餐饮人均80-150元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁7号线/八通线环球度假区站B口出，步行5分钟；公交T116路、589路环球度假区站下车

en.name: Universal Beijing Resort
en.description: A world-class theme park featuring global IPs like Harry Potter and Transformers; fully standardized English services
en.address: Intersection of Jingha Expressway and East 6th Ring Road, Tongzhou District
en.pricing: Standard tickets RMB 528-748 per person; Express Pass RMB 400-1200; dining averages RMB 80-150 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 7/Batong Line to Universal Resort (Exit B), 5-minute walk; Bus T116 or 589 to Universal Resort

zh_cn.name: 南锣鼓巷 + 雨儿胡同
zh_cn.description: 北京最知名文艺胡同集群，主街热闹、支线安静，文创小店与传统民居交融
zh_cn.address: 东城区南锣鼓巷（南起地安门东大街，北至鼓楼东大街）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，消费人均50-100元（小吃、咖啡、文创）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁6/8号线南锣鼓巷站E口出，步行300米；公交107、124路宝钞胡同站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: Nanluoguxiang & Yuer Hutong
en.description: Beijing's most iconic artistic hutong area, blending lively streets with quiet alleys and creative shops
en.address: Nanluoguxiang (from Di'anmen East Street to Gulou East Street), Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Free to explore; typical spending RMB 50-100 per person on snacks, coffee, and souvenirs
en.directions: Subway Lines 6/8 to Nanluoguxiang (Exit E), 300 m walk; Bus 107/124 to Baochao Hutong, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 什刹海 + 烟袋斜街
zh_cn.description: “北方水乡”核心区，前海、后海环湖漫步，烟袋斜街连接传统商铺与现代酒吧
zh_cn.address: 西城区什刹海地区（前海、后海、西海）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，游船150-200元/小时（6人船），酒吧消费人均100-200元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁8号线什刹海站A口出，步行500米；公交5、635路德内甘水桥站下车，步行8分钟

en.name: Shichahai & Yandai Xiejie
en.description: The heart of Beijing's "northern water town," ideal for lakeside walks, linking historic shops and modern bars
en.address: Shichahai Area (Qianhai, Houhai, Xihai), Xicheng District
en.pricing: Free to explore; boat rides RMB 150-200 per hour for a 6-person boat; bars average RMB 100-200 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 8 to Shichahai (Exit A), 500 m walk; Bus 5/635 to Denei Ganshuiqiao, 8-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 五道营胡同
zh_cn.description: 比南锣鼓巷更安静的文艺胡同，聚集精品咖啡、手作店、小画廊，文艺氛围浓厚
zh_cn.address: 东城区五道营胡同（南起安定门东大街，北至雍和宫大街）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，消费人均40-80元（咖啡、手作）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线雍和宫站D口出，步行400米；公交13、684路五道营胡同站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Wudaoying Hutong
en.description: A quieter, more refined hutong alternative, filled with cafés, craft shops, and small galleries
en.address: Wudaoying Hutong (from Andingmen East Street to Yonghegong Street), Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Free to explore; typical spending RMB 40-80 per person on coffee and handmade goods
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Yonghegong (Exit D), 400 m walk; Bus 13/684 to Wudaoying Hutong, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 前门大街 + 大栅栏
zh_cn.description: 百年皇家商街，老字号云集（瑞蚨祥、内联升），复古牌楼与京味建筑适合打卡
zh_cn.address: 东城区前门大街（南起珠市口东大街，北至正阳门）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，老字号消费人均100-300元，纪念品10-100元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线前门站C口出，步行200米；公交5、17、20路前门站下车，步行1分钟

en.name: Qianmen Street & Dashilan
en.description: A historic shopping street lined with time-honored brands, featuring traditional architecture and iconic gates
en.address: Qianmen Street (from Zhushikou East Street to Zhengyang Gate), Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Free to explore; spending at heritage brands averages RMB 100-300 per person; souvenirs RMB 10-100
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Qianmen (Exit C), 200 m walk; Bus 5/17/20 to Qianmen, 1-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 三里屯太古里
zh_cn.description: 北京最国际化时尚商圈，潮牌、西餐、酒吧集中，外国人密度最高，涉外服务完善
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，潮牌消费500-2000元，西餐人均150-300元，酒吧人均200-500元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁10号线团结湖站A口出，步行800米；公交113、115、431路三里屯站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Taikoo Li Sanlitun
en.description: Beijing's most international shopping and nightlife district, packed with global brands, dining, and bars
en.address: No. 19 Sanlitun Road, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Free to explore; designer and streetwear shopping typically ranges from RMB 500-2000; Western dining averages RMB 150-300 per person; bars RMB 200-500 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 10 to Tuanjiehu (Exit A), 800 m walk; Bus 113/115/431 to Sanlitun, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 蓝色港湾
zh_cn.description: 欧式水岸商业街区，灯光夜景绝美，适合休闲散步、亲子互动与轻夜生活
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，餐饮人均80-150元，亲子项目50-100元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁14号线枣营站A口出，步行1公里；公交419、682、851路枣营路北口站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: Solana Lifestyle Shopping Park
en.description: A European-style waterfront district with stunning night views, perfect for strolls and relaxed evenings
en.address: No. 6 Chaoyang Park Road, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Free to explore; dining averages RMB 80-150 per person; family activities RMB 50-100 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 14 to Zaoying (Exit A), 1 km walk; Bus 419/682/851 to Zaoying North, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 模式口大街
zh_cn.description: 京西古道改造的文化街区，结合古街风貌与现代文创，法海寺、承恩寺等古迹散落其中
zh_cn.address: 石景山区模式口大街（东起金顶街，西至模式口西里）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，法海寺门票40元/人，文创消费30-100元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁6号线金安桥站C口出，打车10分钟；公交336、389、597路模式口西里站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: Moshikou Street
en.description: A revitalized historic trail turned cultural district, blending heritage with modern creativity
en.address: Moshikou Street (from Jinding Street to Moshikou West Lane), Shijingshan District
en.pricing: Free to explore; Fahai Temple admission RMB 40; cultural and creative products RMB 30-100
en.directions: Subway Line 6 to Jin'anqiao (Exit C), 10-minute taxi; Bus 336/389/597 to Moshikou West, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 杨梅竹斜街
zh_cn.description: 前门附近的安静文艺胡同，独立书店、小众咖啡馆、手作工坊聚集，适合独处打卡
zh_cn.address: 西城区杨梅竹斜街（南起琉璃厂东街，北至前门西大街）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，咖啡人均35-50元，手作人均50-100元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线前门站B口出，步行800米；公交5、20路大栅栏站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Yangmeizhu Xiejie
en.description: A tranquil hutong near Qianmen, home to indie bookstores, niche cafés, and artisan studios
en.address: Yangmeizhu Xiejie (from Liulichang East Street to Qianmen West Street), Xicheng District
en.pricing: Free to explore; coffee averages RMB 35-50 per person; craft activities RMB 50-100 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Qianmen (Exit B), 800 m walk; Bus 5/20 to Dashilan, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 亮马河国际风情水岸
zh_cn.description: 北京国际化休闲带，夜景灯光、游船、酒吧集群，外籍人士聚集地
zh_cn.address: 朝阳区亮马河沿岸（东起东四环，西至燕莎桥）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，游船180-300元/人（夜游），酒吧人均150-400元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁10号线亮马桥站C口出，步行500米；公交413、418、675路安家楼站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Liangma River International Waterfront
en.description: A vibrant international leisure zone with night cruises, bars, and scenic lighting
en.address: Liangma River (from East 4th Ring Road to Yansha Bridge), Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Free to explore; night boat rides RMB 180-300 per person; bars average RMB 150-400 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 10 to Liangmaqiao (Exit C), 500 m walk; Bus 413/418/675 to Anjialou, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 首钢园
zh_cn.description: 工业风改造的网红园区，冬奥滑雪大跳台、巨型钢铁遗迹，适合拍照与亲子游
zh_cn.pricing: 免费入园，部分展馆30元/人，滑雪大跳台参观50元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁11号线首钢园站B口出，步行300米；公交325、370、941路首钢小西门站下车，步行10分钟

en.name: Shougang Park
en.description: A trendy industrial-style park featuring Olympic ski jumps and massive steel structures
en.address: No. 68 Shijingshan Road, Shijingshan District
en.pricing: Free park entry; selected venues charge RMB 30; ski jump visit RMB 50
en.directions: Subway Line 11 to Shougang Park (Exit B), 300 m walk; Bus 325/370/941 to Shougang West Gate, 10-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 潘家园旧货市场
zh_cn.description: 北京最大古玩旧货市场，“鬼市”文化发源地，文玩、字画、老物件应有尽有
zh_cn.pricing: 免费入场，商品价格50-10000元不等（可砍价）
zh_cn.directions: 地铁10号线潘家园站C口出，步行300米；公交34、674路潘家园桥西站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Panjiayuan Antique Market
en.description: Beijing's largest antique market and birthplace of the "ghost market," offering collectibles and curios
en.address: No. 18 Huawei Li, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Free entry; merchandise ranges from RMB 50 to 10,000, and bargaining is common
en.directions: Subway Line 10 to Panjiayuan (Exit C), 300 m walk; Bus 34/674 to Panjiayuan Bridge West, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 三里屯酒吧街
zh_cn.description: 北京最知名的酒吧集群，清吧、夜店、Livehouse全覆盖，外籍人士夜生活核心区
zh_cn.pricing: 啤酒50-100元/瓶，鸡尾酒80-150元/杯，Livehouse门票100-300元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁10号线团结湖站A口出，步行800米；公交113、115路三里屯站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Sanlitun Bar Street
en.description: The city's most famous bar district, covering everything from lounges to live music venues
en.address: Sanlitun Road, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Beer RMB 50-100 per bottle; cocktails RMB 80-150; live music venue tickets RMB 100-300
en.directions: Subway Line 10 to Tuanjiehu (Exit A), 800 m walk; Bus 113/115 to Sanlitun, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 簋街（东直门）
zh_cn.description: 北京“夜宵第一街”，麻辣小龙虾、羊蝎子、卤煮等特色美食集中，夜生活热门地
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线东直门站D口出，步行500米；公交107、123路东直门内站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Guijie Food Street (Dongzhimen)
en.description: Beijing's ultimate late-night food street, famous for crayfish, lamb spine hotpot, and local snacks
en.address: Dongzhimen Inner Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Spicy crayfish RMB 158-188 per jin; lamb spine hotpot RMB 128-168 per pot; average spend RMB 150-250 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Dongzhimen (Exit D), 500 m walk; Bus 107/123 to Dongzhimen Inner, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 蓝色港湾灯光节（冬季限定）
zh_cn.description: 冬季限定网红灯光盛宴，欧式建筑搭配梦幻灯光，适合拍照与亲子互动
zh_cn.address: 朝阳区朝阳公园路6号（蓝色港湾内）
zh_cn.opening_hours: 17:00-23:00（每年11月-次年2月，以官方通知为准）
zh_cn.pricing: 免费入场，部分互动灯光项目30-50元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁14号线枣营站A口出，步行1公里；公交419、682路枣营路北口站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: Solana Light Festival (Winter Only)
en.description: A seasonal winter light festival with European-style architecture and dazzling displays
en.address: No. 6 Chaoyang Park Road (inside Solana), Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Free entry; selected interactive light attractions cost RMB 30-50 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 14 to Zaoying (Exit A), 1 km walk; Bus 419/682 to Zaoying North, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 红桥市场
zh_cn.description: 北京老牌涉外批发市场，珍珠、丝绸、工艺品、纪念品齐全，英文服务成熟
zh_cn.pricing: 珍珠项链100-5000元，丝绸制品50-300元，纪念品10-50元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁5号线天坛东门站B口出，步行400米；公交36、106、110路红桥市场站下车，步行1分钟

en.name: Hongqiao Market (Pearl Market)
en.description: A long-established international market offering pearls, silk, crafts, and souvenirs
en.address: No. 46 Tiantan East Road, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Pearl necklaces range from RMB 100-5000; silk products RMB 50-300; souvenirs RMB 10-50
en.directions: Subway Line 5 to Tiantan East Gate (Exit B), 400 m walk; Bus 36/106/110 to Hongqiao Market, 1-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 秀水街
zh_cn.description: 北京最知名的涉外购物街，丝绸、定制服装、箱包、文创产品齐全，英文服务一流
zh_cn.directions: 地铁1号线永安里站D口出，步行300米；公交1、2、52路永安里路口西站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Silk Street (Xiushui Market)
en.description: Beijing's best-known shopping street for international visitors, with silk, tailoring, and gifts
en.address: No. 8 Xiushui East Street, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Custom suits RMB 500-2000; silk shirts RMB 100-300; bags RMB 200-1000
en.directions: Subway Line 1 to Yonganli (Exit D), 300 m walk; Bus 1/2/52 to Yonganli West, 2-minute walk

poiName: 北京侨福芳草地购物中心

zh_cn.name: 侨福芳草地
zh_cn.description: 艺术与商业结合的购物中心，遍布雕塑、画廊，文创、餐饮、购物一站式体验
zh_cn.pricing: 餐饮人均100-200元，文创产品50-300元，艺术展览免费-100元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁6号线东大桥站A口出，步行300米；公交109、112、140路东大桥路口东站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Parkview Green
en.description: A shopping mall blending art and commerce, featuring galleries, sculptures, and lifestyle experiences
en.address: No. 9 Dongdaqiao Road, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Dining averages RMB 100-200 per person; cultural and creative products RMB 50-300; art exhibitions free to RMB 100
en.directions: Subway Line 6 to Dongdaqiao (Exit A), 300 m walk; Bus 109/112/140 to Dongdaqiao East, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 奥林匹克公园（夜景）
zh_cn.description: 奥运遗产公园，鸟巢、水立方夜景灯光璀璨，音乐喷泉与灯光秀震撼人心
zh_cn.pricing: 免费入园，鸟巢内部参观50元/人，水立方内部参观30元/人
zh_cn.directions: 地铁8/15号线奥林匹克公园站D口出，步行500米；公交82、419、538路奥林匹克公园站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Olympic Park (Night View)
en.description: An Olympic legacy park with dazzling night views of iconic venues and spectacular light shows
en.address: Olympic Park, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Free park entry; Bird's Nest interior tour RMB 50; Water Cube interior tour RMB 30
en.directions: Subway Lines 8/15 to Olympic Park (Exit D), 500 m walk; Bus 82/419/538 to Olympic Park, 3-minute walk

poiName: 同仁堂知嘛健康(零号店)

zh_cn.name: 同仁堂知嘛健康（零号店）
zh_cn.description: 传统中药品牌跨界体验店，可体验草本咖啡、药茶DIY，了解中医文化
zh_cn.pricing: 草本咖啡38-58元/杯，药茶DIY68-128元/人，中药文创50-200元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线前门站C口出，步行300米；公交5、17、20路前门站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: Tongrentang Zhima Health (Flagship Store)
en.description: A modern TCM concept store offering herbal coffee and DIY medicinal teas
en.address: No. 11 Qianmen Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Herbal coffee RMB 38-58 per cup; DIY medicinal tea experience RMB 68-128 per person; TCM-themed products RMB 50-200
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Qianmen (Exit C), 300 m walk; Bus 5/17/20 to Qianmen, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 北京坊
zh_cn.description: 历史建筑改造的文创商业街区，集合网红书店、精品咖啡、文创商店，传统风貌与现代休闲完美融合
zh_cn.address: 西城区煤市街廊房头条13号
zh_cn.pricing: 免费游览，咖啡人均40-60元，文创消费50-150元，网红书店阅读免费
zh_cn.directions: 地铁2号线前门站C口出，步行600米；公交5、20路大栅栏站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Beijing Fun
en.description: A creative district set in renovated historic buildings, blending culture with modern lifestyle
en.address: No. 13 Langfang Toutiao, Meishi Street, Xicheng District
en.pricing: Free to explore; coffee averages RMB 40-60 per person; cultural and creative shopping RMB 50-150; reading in the popular bookstore is free
en.directions: Subway Line 2 to Qianmen (Exit C), 600 m walk; Bus 5/20 to Dashilan, 3-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 北京国际饭店诺金百货（涉外便民）
zh_cn.description: 紧邻使馆区的涉外便民百货，日用品、食品、进口商品齐全，英文服务完善，外籍人士采购首选
zh_cn.address: 东城区建国门内大街9号北京国际饭店内
zh_cn.pricing: 日用品人均50-200元，进口食品30-100元/份，涉外服务按需收费
zh_cn.directions: 地铁1/2号线建国门站A口出，步行300米；公交1、52、99路建国门内站下车，步行2分钟

en.name: NUO Mall at Beijing International Hotel
en.description: A convenient international supermarket near embassy areas, popular among expats
en.address: Beijing International Hotel, No. 9 Jianguomen Inner Street, Dongcheng District
en.pricing: Daily essentials typically cost RMB 50-200; imported foods RMB 30-100; international assistance services available as needed
en.directions: Subway Lines 1/2 to Jianguomen (Exit A), 300 m walk; Bus 1/52/99 to Jianguomen Inner, 2-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 同仁堂中医诊所（涉外诊疗）
zh_cn.description: 提供涉外中医诊疗服务的专业机构，针灸、推拿、中药调理齐全，英文诊疗方案与导诊服务
zh_cn.address: 朝阳区三里屯路19号太古里北区N8-30
zh_cn.directions: 地铁10号线团结湖站A口出，步行800米；公交113、115路三里屯站下车，步行5分钟

en.name: Tongrentang TCM Clinic (International Services)
en.description: A professional TCM clinic offering acupuncture, massage, and herbal treatment with English consultations
en.address: N8-30, Taikoo Li North, No. 19 Sanlitun Road, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Acupuncture RMB 200-400 per session; tui na massage RMB 150-300; herbal treatment plans RMB 300-800 per course
en.directions: Subway Line 10 to Tuanjiehu (Exit A), 800 m walk; Bus 113/115 to Sanlitun, 5-minute walk

zh_cn.name: 北京SKP-S（涉外潮流生活）
zh_cn.description: 融合科技、艺术与潮流的高端购物中心，国际潮牌、艺术展览、涉外服务齐全，外籍潮流人士聚集地
zh_cn.pricing: 潮牌消费1000-5000元，艺术展览免费，餐饮人均200-500元
zh_cn.directions: 地铁14号线大望路站F口出，步行500米；公交312、502、666路八王坟西站下车，步行3分钟

en.name: Beijing SKP-S
en.description: A high-end mall combining tech, art, and fashion, attracting global trendsetters
en.address: No. 86 Jianguo Road, Chaoyang District
en.pricing: Designer and streetwear shopping typically ranges from RMB 1000-5000; art exhibitions are free; dining averages RMB 200-500 per person
en.directions: Subway Line 14 to Dawanglu (Exit F), 500 m walk; Bus 312/502/666 to Bawangfen West, 3-minute walk
